title: Israel is using the ceasefire in Gaza to cement its grip on the territory
subhead: Nearly eight months after Israel announced a ceasefire that its army is violating daily, the country continues to strike the part of the enclave it occupies. Some in Israel are calling to resume airstrikes more intensively.

title: Bruce Springsteen calls out the White House and announces a protest festival: 'Join us and let's fight for the America that we love'
subhead: Springsteen, a vocal critic of US President Donald Trump, will headline a star-studded protest along with Foo Fighters, Dave Matthews, Brittany Howard and Joan Baez at a protest festival in Washington, DC, a month before the midterm elections. 'There is no one coming to save us. We've got to do it ourselves,' he said on Wednesday.

subhead: The Ukrainian capital endured a barrage of strikes over the weekend, including ballistic missiles, cruise missiles and long-range drones. These increasingly frequent hybrid operations reveal the intensification of Russian drone and missile production.
